title: Commodities Brief — 23 Jun 2026
intro:
Broad-based commodity selloff accelerates with precious metals, energy, and industrial metals under pressure as risk-off sentiment intensifies across markets. Weekly losses deepen amid strengthening dollar and mounting concerns over global demand outlook heading into month-end positioning.
🥇 PRECIOUS METALS
Gold $4159.80 -0.53% intraday, -4.57% weekly | Bias: NEUTRAL-BEARISH | Key levels: $4100 support / $4250 resistance. Profit-taking accelerates after failing to hold $4300, with technical damage mounting below the 50-day MA. Silver $62.17 -5.12% underperforms sharply, breaking below $63 support with industrial demand concerns amplifying precious metal weakness. Platinum $1664.30 -0.36% shows relative resilience but remains pressured by auto sector headwinds. PGM complex down 7-8% weekly signals broad liquidation across metals complex.

sections.heading: 🛢️ COMMODITIES SUMMARY
sections.content:
Broad-based commodity selloff accelerates with precious metals, energy, and industrial metals under pressure as risk-off sentiment intensifies across markets. Weekly losses deepen amid strengthening dollar and mounting concerns over global demand outlook heading into month-end positioning.
🥇 PRECIOUS METALS
Gold $4159.80 -0.53% intraday, -4.57% weekly | Bias: NEUTRAL-BEARISH | Key levels: $4100 support / $4250 resistance. Profit-taking accelerates after failing to hold $4300, with technical damage mounting below the 50-day MA. Silver $62.17 -5.12% underperforms sharply, breaking below $63 support with industrial demand concerns amplifying precious metal weakness. Platinum $1664.30 -0.36% shows relative resilience but remains pressured by auto sector headwinds. PGM complex down 7-8% weekly signals broad liquidation across metals complex.

sections.heading: ⚡ ENERGY
sections.content:
WTI $73.01 -2.42% intraday, -4.92% weekly | Bias: SHORT | Key levels: $71.50 support / $76.00 resistance. Crude extends losses on demand destruction fears and builds in US inventories, testing critical $73 support zone. Brent $76.90 -1.28% holds relatively better with Brent-WTI spread widening to $3.89 on transatlantic flow dynamics. Natural gas $3.18 -2.27% intraday but +1.08% weekly, bucking the trend on cooling demand forecasts supporting summer pricing.
🌾 AGRICULTURE
Corn $436.75 +6.14% leads grain rally on adverse weather reports impacting US Midwest planting progress and yield expectations. Soybeans $1142.25 +2.38% supported by Chinese demand resurgence and South American supply tightness. Wheat $599.25 +0.29% stabilizes after weekly losses as Black Sea export corridor concerns provide modest floor.

sections.heading: 🎯 TRADE IDEAS
sections.content:
LONG: Corn — weather premium building, technical breakout above $430 — Entry $435 — SL $420 — TP $465
LONG: Natural gas — seasonal support, oversold RSI, storage deficit — Entry $3.16 — SL $3.05 — TP $3.45
SHORT: Silver — industrial slowdown, broken support, underperformance vs gold — Entry $62.50 — SL $65.00 — TP $58.00

sections.heading: ⚠️ RISKS
sections.content:
Dollar strength continuing could accelerate commodity liquidation across all sectors with July positioning creating additional volatility.
Chinese stimulus disappointment or deeper US manufacturing contraction would invalidate agricultural and industrial metal recovery scenarios.
